source_jobs.title: Transfer Pricing Associate - 12 Month-FTC
source_jobs.description:
As a Transfer Pricing Associate - 12 Month-FTC at Aibidia, you will play a key supporting role within the Professional Services team, helping to deliver high-quality transfer pricing solutions and implementation support for global clients.

This is an excellent opportunity for a recent graduate looking to build a career at the intersection of tax, technology, and client services within a fast-growing SaaS environment.

In this role, you will support both administrative and implementation-related activities, ensuring smooth project coordination, accurate data handling, and efficient client onboarding processes. You’ll work closely with experienced transfer pricing professionals, consultants, and cross-functional teams to help clients successfully adopt and utilise the Aibidia platform.



Key Responsibilities

 - Pre-population of new client data (group structures, legal entities, TP policies)

 - Ongoing BAU support for established clients

 - Transaction data upload and mapping

 - Preparation for recurring client project calls

 - Monitoring LF and MF deadlines to support proactive planning

 - General project management support (trackers, workplans)

 - Preparing Local Files and Master Files for Manager review

 - Assist with Transfer Pricing related research
   
   

What We’re Looking For:

 - Finance related degree

 - Strong quantitative skills with the ability to analyse financial data and apply economic principles

 - Excellent written and verbal skills, allowing you to communicate findings effectively to clients and team members.
   

Nice to have:

 - Internship in the finance industry



Benefits:

 - A fair share of Aibidia's success, benefiting from a competitive compensation and incentive package.

 - Flexible working hours with a hybrid working policy.

 - Comprehensive healthcare package.

 - Genuine drive towards physical and mental wellbeing, with initiatives by an internal organisational health and wellbeing committee.

 - Regular team social events including Aibidia's summer and winter parties.

 - The latest technology to ensure you can do your best work with the best tools.

 - A boost for your professional development - performance-based growth is part of the company culture and there is a designated learning budget for every employee.

 - An opportunity to be part of a global, fast-growing SaaS company revolutionising a traditional industry.

 - A non-hierarchical atmosphere and stellar culture at the office.
   

We’re a team of 75+ employees representing 27 nationalities, with expertise across Sales, Tax, Technology, Legal, Marketing, and Product. Backed by Global Founders Capital and Icebreaker VC, we’ve built strong traction across Europe, and we’re now bringing that experience and momentum to the U.S. too.

We are committed to fostering an inclusive culture that celebrates diversity, we want you to bring you, no matter your background, gender, race or sexual orientation!

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Sales Development Representative - US
source_jobs.description:
We’ve recently launched in New York, and this is your chance to join as one of our early Enterprise SDR hires in New York! This isn’t just another sales role - it’s an opportunity to be a founding team member, laying the foundation for our growth and playing a crucial role in our U.S. expansion.

As an SDR at Aibidia, you’ll be at the front line of our sales efforts, identifying new opportunities, building relationships with key decision-makers, and fuelling the pipeline for our growing U.S. team. You’ll work closely with leadership and cross-functional teams to refine our outreach strategy and help establish us as a major player in the region.

There is a progression framework for high performers who want to grow into senior/enterprise sales. You’ll work within a modern go-to-market environment alongside Marketing, Product Marketing and Account Executives, using intent data, outbound sequencing, events, LinkedIn Sales Navigator and personalized outreach to generate enterprise pipeline.



About us:

We’re a fast-growing SaaS and Services company with 70+ employees from 27 nationalities, bringing expertise across Sales, Tax, Technology, Legal, Marketing, and Product. Backed by top-tier investors Global Founders Capital and Icebreaker VC, we’ve seen huge success in Europe, and now, we’re bringing that momentum to the U.S.

If you’re looking for a high impact, fast-track sales role where you can shape the future of a rapidly growing company, this is your moment. Ready to make your mark? Join us in New York!


What you’ll be getting up to:

 - Consistently execute high-quality prospecting activity and contribute qualified pipeline for the U.S. sales team.

 - Becoming knowledgeable with Aibidia’s industry, market, product, ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) and KBPs (Key Buying Personas).

 - Execute strategic outbound prospecting across phone, email, LinkedIn, and personalized video outreach to engage enterprise tax and finance leaders.

 - Utilise our intent and AI tech stack to compose personalised, problem-led messaging that resonates with senior tax and transfer pricing leaders.

 - Be the first point of contact for potential customers, working closely with Account Executives to ensure a smooth handoff of leads.

 - Work closely with the Marketing team to engage and convert marketing-qualified leads (MQLs) into sales opportunities.

 - Work with and influence our prospecting playbooks, containing KPIs aligned to your targets (generating qualified pipeline).

 - Please note, as an early member of our U.S. SDR team, you’ll have direct influence on how we build outbound strategy, messaging, and pipeline generation in North America.



What we’re looking for:

 - Prior SDR experience in an international facing role

 - Experience prospecting into enterprise organizations with multiple stakeholders and long sales cycles

 - Strong and demonstrable ability to consistently generate qualified meetings and pipeline through disciplined outbound execution in the U.S.

 - Comfortable working with tools such as LinkedIn Sales Navigator and Salesforce. Experience working intent data, AI for outreach personalisation and closely with Marketing functions.

 - Excellent communication skills, with the ability to confidently and effectively engage CFOs, Heads of Tax, and other senior decision-makers

 - This position requires being in the office 3 days per week to support collaboration and team engagement.

Nice to have:

 - Experience of working in International Tax, Transfer Pricing and/or Consulting

 - Skills in creative cold outreach i.e. Loom and video-based outreach

 - Solid LinkedIn presence.



What success looks like:

 - Building qualified pipeline consistently within U.S. enterprise multinational accounts

 - Developing confidence engaging senior tax and finance stakeholders via problem-led messaging

 - Becoming highly effective in strategic outbound prospecting

 - Partnering closely with Marketing and Account Executives

 - Progressin

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Sales Development Representative - UK
source_jobs.description:
We’re looking for a driven, ambitious Enterprise Sales Development Representative (SDR) to join our London team and play a key role in our continued growth. This isn’t just another sales role, it’s your opportunity to be part of a fast-growing company where your work will have a real impact.

As an Enterprise SDR at Aibidia, you’ll be at the forefront of our sales efforts. Identifying new business opportunities, engaging with key stakeholders and fuelling the pipeline for our commercial team. You’ll work closely with leadership and cross-functional teams to refine our outreach strategy and help us scale across new markets.

We’re a diverse team of 80+ professionals from 27 nationalities, bringing together expertise across Sales, Tax, Technology, Legal, Marketing, and Product. Backed by top-tier investors like Global Founders Capital and Icebreaker VC, we’ve already seen strong success across Europe - and we’re just getting started.

If you’re looking for a high-impact, fast-paced sales role where you can grow quickly and make your mark, this is your moment. Ready to take the next step in your sales career? Join us in London.



What you’ll be getting up to:

 - Play a key role in Aibidia’s success in becoming the market leading Transfer Pricing Platform.

 - Becoming knowledgeable with Aibidia’s industry, market, product, ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) and KBPs (Key Buying Personas).

 - Be the first point of contact for potential customers, working closely with Account Executives to ensure a smooth handoff of leads.

 - Work closely with the Marketing team to engage and convert marketing-qualified leads (MQLs) into sales opportunities.

 - Meet the agreed KPIs for weekly activities and quarterly number of sales-qualified opportunities.

 - Conduct cold calls, emails, and LinkedIn outreach to connect with potential clients.

 - Develop personalised messaging to engage and educate prospects.


What we’re looking for:

 - Prior SDR experience in an international facing role

 - Track record of managing complex sales cycles and engaging with enterprise clients

 - Strong history of quota attainment, with a focus on productivity metrics (phone calls, emails, etc)

 - Comfortable working with tools such as LinkedIn Sales Navigator and Salesforce

 - Excellent communication skills, with the ability to effectively engage and present to CFOs, Heads of Tax, and other senior decision-makers

 - Degree in STEM or Economics/Business/Law

 - This position requires being in the office 2 days per week to support collaboration and team engagement.

Nice to have:

 - Experience of working in International Tax, Transfer Pricing and/or Consulting

 - Skills in creative cold outreach i.e. Loom

 - Solid LinkedIn presence
   

Our UK Benefits:

 - A fair share of Aibidia's success, benefiting from a competitive compensation and incentive package

 - Flexible working hours with a hybrid working policy

 - Comprehensive healthcare package

 - Genuine drive towards physical and mental wellbeing, with initiatives by an internal organisational health and wellbeing committee

 - Regular team social events including Aibidia's summer and winter parties

 - The latest technology to ensure you can do your best work with the best tools

 - A boost for your professional development - performance-based growth is part of the company culture and there is a designated learning budget for every employee

 - An opportunity to be part of a global, fast-growing SaaS company revolutionising a traditional industry

 - A non-hierarchical atmosphere and stellar culture at the office.
   

We are committed to fostering an inclusive culture that celebrates diversity, we want you to bring you, no matter your background, gender, race or sexual orientation!

Please note, we’re unable to provide visa sponsorship for this role. To be considered, you’ll need to show proof of your eligibility to work in the country.

source_jobs.title: Transfer Pricing Manager
source_jobs.description:
As a Transfer Pricing Senior/Manager at Aibidia, you will play a key role within the Professional Services team, helping to deliver high-quality transfer pricing solutions and implementation support for global clients.

This is an excellent opportunity for an experienced Transfer Pricing Professional looking to build a career at the intersection of tax, technology, and client services within a fast-growing SaaS environment.

In this role, you will apply your strong understanding of transfer pricing principles and regulations to help optimise our customers' transfer pricing documentation and strategies. Working closely with customers and internal stakeholders, you will support documentation compliance, mitigate risk, and drive operational efficiency through the Aibidia platform. Your insights and hands-on experience will help shape the future of transfer pricing documentation.



Key Responsibilities

 - Manage and oversee Transfer Pricing documentation and advisory projects for MNEs of varying sizes and industries using the Aibidia platform, ensuring the highest-quality services and delivery within deadlines

 - Leverage the Aibidia platform to streamline and automate transfer pricing documentation, benchmarking, and reporting processes
   
   - Pre-population of new client data (group structures, legal entities, TP policies)
   
   - Ongoing BAU support for established clients
   
   - Transaction data upload and mapping
   
   - Preparation for recurring client project calls
   
   - Monitoring LF and MF deadlines to support proactive planning
   
   - General project management support (trackers, workplans)
   
   - Preparing Local Files and Master Files
   
   - Providing Transfer Pricing advisory

 - Collaborate with cross-functional customer teams, including tax, finance, and IT, to ensure seamless integration and adoption of the Aibidia platform

 - Participate in discovery sessions and conduct early-stage expert discussions with prospective customers and other stakeholders to understand their Transfer Pricing set-up, and clearly articulate how Aibidia solutions address their specific needs and create significant impact

 - Contribute to business development activities, including proposals and customer presentations to help expand Aibidia’s market presence

 - Play an active role in Aibidia's growth by contributing to the development and enhancement of data transformation strategies and solutions

 - Monitor and stay current on global transfer pricing regulations and development, ensuring customers’ compliance and strategic alignment.



Skills, Knowledge, and Expertise

Must have:

 - Finance, accounting, economics related degree

 - Minimum of 3-5 years of professional experience in Transfer Pricing, with a strong preference for experience at a major public accounting or consulting firm;

 - Strong knowledge of transfer pricing principles and OECD Guidelines

 - Demonstrated ability to operate both as an individual contributor for complex transfer pricing documentation projects as well as managing global documentation projects

 - Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English, with the ability to effectively engage with customers, prospects, and internal stakeholders

 - Ability to work effectively across geographies and functions in a multicultural setting

Nice to have:

 - Experience in a Transfer Pricing role in an in-house environment.



Benefits:

 - A fair share of Aibidia's success, benefiting from a competitive compensation and incentive package.

 - Flexible working hours with a hybrid working policy.

 - Comprehensive healthcare package.

 - Genuine drive towards physical and mental wellbeing, with initiatives by an internal organisational health and wellbeing committee.

 - Regular team social events including Aibidia's summer and winter parties.

 - The latest technology to ensure you can do your best work with the best tools.

 - A boost for your professional development - performance-bas

notes: No tech roles posted; sales and transfer pricing roles dominate.
